heroTitle: A clear, benefit-driven headline goes here.
heroSubtitle: One or two sentences describing what you offer, who it's for, and where you work. Replace this with your own copy.
quoteText: The unexamined life is not worth living.
aboutTitle: Hi, I'm Your Name — your title, based in Your City.
aboutContent:
Use this space to introduce yourself and your approach. Describe who you work with, what a client can expect, and what makes your practice a good fit.

Add a second paragraph about your background, training, and philosophy. Keep it warm and specific — this is often the most-read section on the page.

A third short paragraph can cover your credentials, the areas you focus on, or what you value in the work. Edit all of this in the CMS under Homepage.
